title: ASCII Sequence Parity
problem: Copied mermaid-ascii sequence fixtures pass, but merman-ascii still rejects common typed sequence semantics that merman-core can parse.

evidence.result: opened sequence parity lane and recorded copied upstream fixture status
passed focused and broad gates for initial sequence parity slice
split rich sequence constructs into notes, boxes, activations/create-destroy, and wrapping tasks
added single-line typed sequence note rendering
passed focused and broad gates for notes rendering slice
passed focused and broad gates for sequence boxes slice
added typed activation state rendering and split create/destroy lifecycle
passed focused and broad gates for activation rendering slice
added typed actor create/destroy lifecycle and cross message rendering
passed focused and broad gates for actor lifecycle rendering slice

continue_policy.notes: Decide wrapping support for actors/messages/notes, including CJK and emoji width risks.
